_comment: GitHub Copilot CLI PROJECT-LOCAL hook config for the research-pipeline skill.
_comment_scope: Deploy to .github/hooks/research-pipeline.json in your RESEARCH PROJECT (the repo where you run research), NOT to ~/.copilot/hooks/. Project-local scope ensures the Stop hook only fires when you are working in that project, not in unrelated sessions.
_comment_stop: agentStop fires when the main agent finishes a turn. Exit 2 from the hook prevents the agent from stopping and feeds stderr as continuation context.
_comment_prompt: userPromptSubmitted fires before each user prompt is processed. The resume-inject hook is safe to use globally (it exits silently when no round_state.json is present).
